title: spermacoce spiralis
intro: Spermacoce spiralis, also known as Spiral Spermacoce, is a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Spermacoce spiralis are attributed to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Spermacoce spiralis can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
